Hi Emma — I can schedule that. Quick note: 10:00 is already booked on 2024-05-19 (Project Kick-off, 10:00–11:00), and you also have a one-on-one at 11:00–11:30, so a 10:00 start won't work.

Available 1-hour options that day (closest to 10:00):
- 09:00–10:00
- 11:30–12:30

Please confirm:
1) Which time do you want (09:00 or 11:30), or tell me another preferred time that day.
2) Event title (I can use "Follow-up Meeting" if OK).
3) Participants to invite (emails), if any.
4) Location (optional).
5) Short description — I can use: "Follow-up to review progress and action items." — is that OK or would you like a different description?

Once you confirm those, I’ll create the event.
